sprint.goal: Effective implementation of Hi-Fi v2, starting with ROSS
sprint.summary: Concierge-first IA. v1 admin tabs reframed as 'Ross's playbook' — the rules and procedures the future AI agent runs against. Six v1 tabs collapse to three v2 destinations behind the concierge home: Playbook / Activity / People.

phases.name: ROSS v2 — gap analysis & spec
phases.summary: PR #18. Audit found home feed already wired behind ROSS_HOME_REAL_DATA flag.

phases.name: ROSS v2 — wire right-rail + first-run findings
ROSS v2 — action handlers + snooze
phases.summary: PR #20. dispatch(action, card) + rossV2Snooze CF deployed + read-side filter.

phases.name: ROSS v2 — admin redesign (concierge-first IA)
phases.summary: Phase 4a Playbook (PR #21 + locationName fix PR #24), 4b Activity (PR #23), 4c People CRUD (PR #25), and 4d.1 Playbook workflow editor (PR #28) all merged. 4d.2 (template CRUD, superAdmin) is next — reuses the inline-editor + slide-down-confirm patterns from 4d.1.

phases.name: ROSS v2 — onboarding wired
phases.summary: Phase 5 audit (PR #22) confirmed wiring is end-to-end. Two follow-ups added to backlog: integrate page into signup journey + add auth gate.

phases.name: ROSS v2 — askRoss (LLM)
phases.summary: Separate sprint. Anthropic-backed rossChat CF + eval harness + cost cap.

tasks.label: Phase 0 — Project Status + sidebar cleanup + CORS preview fix
Phase 3 — Action handlers + snooze CF deployed
Phase 4a — Playbook tab read-view + locationName fix
Phase 5 audit — confirms onboarding wiring is functional
Onboarding journey integration — wire onboarding-ross-hello into signup flow
Onboarding auth gate — add verifyAdminStatus to main-hello.js

recentlyCompleted.title: docs(ross-v2): backlog + status sync after PR #23/#24
ross-v2: enrich locationName on Playbook tab

high: Food cost open PR — review and merge
medium: Hi-Fi v2 → v1 promotions (guests, queue, analytics, campaigns, receipts)
Sidebar dedup of v2 vs v1 entries (after v2 promotion)
HfModal / HfConfirm design-system components — v2 needs a Hi-Fi-native modal pattern; SweetAlert2 is v1-only
